description: Cryptographically-secure pseudorandom generator methods for generating random bytes, integers, and UUIDs.

methods.name: generateBytes
methods.description: Generates a cryptographically strong pseudorandom set of bytes.

params.name: options.size
params.description: Number of random bytes to generate

methods.name: generateInt
methods.description: Generates a cryptographically strong pseudorandom integer.

params.name: options.min
params.description: Start of random range. Default is 0.

methods.name: generateUUID
methods.description: Generates a v4 Universally Unique Identifier (UUID) using a cryptographically secure random number generator.
